vaccine_exemption_rate.short_description: Percentage of kindergartners with exemptions from MMR vaccination requirements at state level.
vaccine_exemption_rate.long_description: State-level percentage of kindergartners with exemptions from MMR vaccination requirements. Compiled from state-reported exemption data spanning 2009–2024, covering prepandemic (2009–2019) and postpandemic (2020–2024) periods. Data from Kiang et al. 2025 (JAMA).

vaccine_exemption_rate.short_description: Percentage of kindergartners with exemptions from MMR vaccination requirements at county level.
vaccine_exemption_rate.long_description: County-level percentage of kindergartners with exemptions from MMR vaccination requirements. Compiled from state-reported exemption data spanning 2009–2024. County-level coverage varies by state, as not all states report at the county level. Data from Kiang et al. 2025 (JAMA).

bundle_measles/dist/measles_state.parque.short_description: Value for the measles-related measure identified by the source column. Units vary by source.
bundle_measles/dist/measles_state.parque.long_description: Combined state-level measles indicators from multiple sources in long format. The source column identifies the measure type: wastewater_detection_rate (% wastewater samples positive for measles RNA; CDC NWSS), vaccine_exemption_rate (% kindergartners with MMR exemptions; Kiang et al.), jhu_measles_cases (weekly confirmed case counts from JHU), mmr_coverage_healthmap (estimated % children with MMR coverage; HealthMap), cdc_measles_cases (national weekly CDC case counts). Units and time resolutions differ by source.

bundle_measles/dist/measles_county.parqu.short_description: Value for the measles-related measure identified by the source column. Units vary by source.
bundle_measles/dist/measles_county.parqu.long_description: Combined county-level measles indicators from multiple sources in long format. The source column identifies the measure type: wastewater_detection_rate (% wastewater samples positive; CDC NWSS), vaccine_exemption_rate (% kindergartners with MMR exemptions; Kiang et al.), jhu_measles_cases (weekly confirmed case counts; JHU), mmr_coverage_healthmap (estimated % children with MMR coverage; HealthMap), wapo_county_vax_rate (county MMR vaccination rate; Washington Post). Units and time resolutions differ by source.
